proposal.claim: pipeline append+replicate: leader replicates entry while appending next
proposal.structural_delta: latency: pipelined replication, 2 -> 1 effective round in steady state
proposal.diff:
--- a/log_replication.tla
+++ b/log_replication.tla
-AppendEntry(leader, entry) == ...
-ReplicateEntry(leader, replica, entry) == ...
+AppendAndReplicate(leader, entry) ==
+  /\ log' = [log EXCEPT ![leader] = Append(log[leader], entry)]
+  /\ Send to all replicas

review.argument: replication depends on entry content, not full post-append state

structural_verification.evidence: append+replicate merged, one fewer sequential round
